sections.paragraph:
ἀπόβλητος, ον verbal adj. of ἀποβάλλω (Hom. et al.; pap, Aq., Sym.; Philo, Spec. Leg. 2, 169 [cp. Nägeli 25]) rejected (Herm. Wr. 6, 1)=unclean (opp. κάλος) 1 Ti 4:4.—DELG s.v. βάλλω.

adj. adj. = adjective

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

Aq Aq , II a.d.—List 5

Sym. Sym. = Symmachus, Greek version of the OT—List 2, beg., 5

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

Herm. Wr. Herm. Wr. = Hermetic Writings—List 5

opp. opp. = opposed to, opposite

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 107
